Patch Set 1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

You need to rebase against master. Since a refresh is needed I like to suggest that LC_BLOCKS_FOR_TRUNCATE be removed from 
lustre/autoconf/lustre-core.m4 since it is no longer needed.

Patch Set 1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Okay I trace the problem due to my git tree some how getting corrupt. Once I checked out a new tree the problem went away. The patch does apply. If the patch is refreshed I recommend removing the macro LC_BLOCKS_FOR_TRUNCATE.

parents.subject: LU-3162 lov: Get the correct address of lmm_objects

commit.subject: LU-2158 lvfs: remove llog_lvfs.c and other lvfs code from llog
commit.message:
LU-2158 lvfs: remove llog_lvfs.c and other lvfs code from llog

- remove obdfilter/llog_lvfs.c
- remove lgh_file from llog_header

Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mike.pershin@intel.com>
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>
Change-Id: I711e047dcb61f3ac62b33c5a21ae32fe87d7efd6
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/5331
Tested-by: Hudson
Reviewed-by: Keith Mannthey <keith.mannthey@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <whamcloud.maloo@gmail.com>
